series_metadata.series_title: Audio Recordings of Bureau of Motor Vehicle (BMV) Phone Center calls
series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains recordings of BMV Phone Center inbound and outbound calls for quality assurance, training, and/or investigation of customer complaints. Any call needed for discipline or investigation would be copied from the system and retained according to the appropriate retention schedule.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Records will automatically be deleted by 3rd party system ninety (90) days. Calls needed employee discipline or investigation would be downloaded from system and retained according appropriate retention schedule
